62.reason: [The output format includes an extra space after the height; also, the traversal order is post-order, not in-order, but more critically, the height calculation is incorrect because 'num' is incremented on both recursive calls without tracking actual depth properly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The height is passed incorrectly: it should be computed on the way down, not up. Also, extra space after \n]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The space after \n is incorrect and the order of traversal is wrong; should be left-to-right leaf order which requires in-order traversal to print before recursing right, but here it prints after both recursions, making it post-order. Also, height starts at 1 for root, but passed as 1 from main, yet incremented before checking children, leading to off-by-one if not handled correctly. However, primary issue is traversal order: printing after both recursive calls makes it post-order, not in-order. For left-to-right leaves, in-order is correct, but print must happen between left and right recursion.]

However, the main logic error is that the height is incremented on the way down but printed after recursive calls, so 'num' represents depth from root correctly, but the bigger issue is the loop in main.]

72.reason: [Loop starts at i=1 instead of i=0, so it reads only n-1 numbers instead of n.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop runs from 1 to n-1, so only n-1 numbers are read instead of n]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop starts at i=1, so only reads n-1 numbers instead of n. Should be i = 0; i < n; i++.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop starts at i=1 and runs while i < n, so it reads only n-1 numbers instead of n. It should be i = 0; i < n or i = 1; i <= n. This causes one input value to be skipped, leading to incomplete tree construction.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop starts at i=1, so only n-1 numbers are read instead of n]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop starts at i=1 instead of i=0, so it reads only n-1 numbers instead of n.]

78.reason: [The traversal order is not left-to-right leaf order; also height logic is flawed because num increases on both recursive calls before checking leaf]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The traversal order is not left-to-right leaf order; also height logic is flawed because num increases on both recursive calls before checking leaf]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Passes initial height as 1, which is correct per problem (root height = 1), but due to incorrect traversal order and extra space in output, results are wrong.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The traversal function 'inorder' processes children before printing the current node (due to recursive calls before the print condition), which means it's effectively a post-order traversal regarding the print statement. However, for left-to-right leaf output, a standard in-order traversal would work if the print were in the middle. But here, because the print happens after both recursions, it prints leaves from left to right? Actually, no: the left subtree is fully traversed (including printing its leaves), then the right, so leaf order is correct. However, the height 'num' is passed as depth+1 on each call, but since the print occurs after recursion, the 'num' value at print time is actually the depth of the leaf (since it was incremented on the way down). BUT: the initial call uses count=1, and each recursive call uses num+1, so depth is correctly tracked. However, the real critical bug is the loop reading n-1 values. Also, the output has a trailing space: " %d\n " should be " %d\n" without trailing space. But the problem says output format is "value height" separated by space and then newline鈥攖railing space may cause presentation error. However, the primary functional error is the loop.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Passing height as 1 but using post-order style; should use pre-order to correctly track height]
